name: Coffee Liqueur
recipeIngredient: 6 cups freshly brewed very strong coffee (consider decaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar into the coffee until dissolved and bring to a rolling boil; immediately turn off the heat. Allow to cool.
2. Chop the vanilla bean into small pieces, taking care to preserve the seeds. Place the pieces at the bottom of a large sterilized glass jar. Pour in the vodka.
3. Add the cooled sugar-coffee mixture and chocolate syrup. Stir gently and cover the container. Let the mixture rest for 30 days.
4. Strain twice through cheesecloth or coffee filter. The liqueur will keep well on the pantry shelf for several months.
